indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The presence of a couch suggests a living area rather than a dedicated workspace.

indicators.name: armchairs
indicators.rationale: Armchairs are not suitable for extended computer work due to their lack of ergonomic support.

indicators.name: coffee table
indicators.rationale: A coffee table is not a flat surface suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: lack of flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no dedicated desk or table at sitting height for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No chairs or seating options that provide ergonomic support for extended computer use.

indicators.name: no flat screen TV
indicators.rationale: A flat screen TV is not a substitute for a computer monitor.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While there are no overt distractions, the lack of a dedicated flat work surface, ergonomic seating, and a flat screen TV makes it difficult to set up a productive workstation. The presence of a couch and armchairs further undermines the suitability for focused solo work.
